message:
refactor(core): update security subsystem, runtime infrastructure, and supporting modules

Security (12 files):
- isolation_rail_router.rs: Continued refinement of Standard→Elevated→HighAssurance→Critical
  rail model with enhanced policy continuity invariants
- lineage_tracker.rs: Extended sentinel detection with covert channel scanning
- zk_attestation.rs: Attestation vector refresh and verification pipeline updates
- adversarial_runner.rs, adversary_graph.rs: Adversarial simulation refinements
- trust_complexity.rs, trust_zone.rs: Trust metric recalibration
- revocation_freshness_gate.rs: Freshness threshold adjustments
- vef_degraded_mode.rs: VEF graceful degradation for attestation failures
- bpet/economic_integration.rs, dgis/barrier_primitives.rs, dgis/update_copilot.rs:
  Security subsystem integration updates
- mod.rs: Updated security module exports

Runtime (14 files):
- nversion_oracle.rs: Oracle documentation and structural improvements
- optimization_governor.rs: Safety envelope refinements
- isolation_mesh.rs, incident_lab.rs, epoch_guard.rs, epoch_transition.rs:
  Runtime isolation and epoch management updates
- anti_entropy.rs, authority_audit.rs, lane_scheduler.rs, obligation_channel.rs,
  region_tree.rs, safe_mode.rs, speculation/proof_executor.rs, time_travel.rs:
  Cross-cutting runtime refinements

Also updates: main.rs, config.rs, deterministic_seed.rs, proof_carrying_decode.rs,
time_travel_engine.rs, replay_capsule.rs, storage adapters, testing infrastructure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
